contributor-history-ranking.description: Review full git history, stack-rank contributor impact by change frequency and complexity, and publish docs/contributors.md.
contributor-history-ranking.prompt:
Review the full git history of this repository and stack-rank all contributing git user profiles by overall impact.

Scope:
- Use exhaustive commit-level analysis across every reachable branch and tag.
- Validate findings with git commands before finalizing.

Scoring:
- Compute at least two explicit signals per contributor.
- Frequency score: commit count and active timespan.
- Complexity score: change-set breadth and depth, for example files changed, insertions/deletions, directory spread, and refactor-style commits.
- Document methodology so rankings are reproducible.

Deliverable:
- Produce or update ./docs/contributors.md.
- Include analysis scope.
- Include scoring method.
- Include a ranked table of contributors with frequency and complexity metrics.
- Include key observations and caveats.

Repository state:
- If the cloned repository is not initialized, use only gh CLI and git tools to create and push the main branch, then continue once git state is ready.
- Do not stop work only because PR creation or remote CI/CD watch is unavailable in runtime. Finish repository changes and local validation possible in this environment.

Failure reporting:
- If failures occur, return explicit fields to the calling agent exactly as:
  Failure: <short failure summary>
  Error details: <concrete command error or blocker>.

Validation:
- If local test or validation tooling is unavailable in this runtime, for example `command not found`, do not fail solely for that. Continue with any alternative checks available and clearly report the validation gap.
contributor-history-ranking.prTitle: Molten Hub Code: Contributor History Ranking
